title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 28 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 28 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 28 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/12/2023
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower, futures fall in the day. the main contract I2405 closed 966.some traders quotation is still stronger. Steel mills are cautious and cautious today, with a focus on purchasing at lower prices.
